flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Roosevelt University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (39.5% → 35.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Roosevelt University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.summary: In-state tuition at Roosevelt University fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.5k → $21.3k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Roosevelt University fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.5k → $21.3k).
